creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:

From-To: open->feedback

And I get a different value altogether. 
Attempting to fetch http://cloud.github.com/downloads/samaelszafran/bsdinfo/bsdinfo-0.1.tar.gz 
fetch: http://cloud.github.com/downloads/samaelszafran/bsdinfo/bsdinfo-0.1.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 33280, actual 3964 
Are you the author of bsdinfo? or can we pull this from the official distribution site instead?
